summary: Experienced Full Stack Developer with over {{yearsExperience}} years of expertise in web development. Proficient in React.js and Spring Boot, with a demonstrated history of enhancing system performance and user engagement through innovative solutions.

highlights: Designed and developed a microservices-based recruitment platform, WelHire, using Spring Boot and React.js.
Implemented CV parsing, JD-CV matching, AI-driven scoring, and automated interview scheduling workflows.
Developed secure REST APIs with JWT authentication and role-based access control.
Optimized PostgreSQL and MongoDB queries to enhance candidate evaluation performance and reduce latency.
Collaborated on scalable frontend modules using React, TypeScript, and MUI to deliver dynamic recruitment dashboards.
Developed reusable and scalable React components following Atomic Design principles.
Integrated components into Storybook for documentation, testing, and isolated behavior showcases.
Designed backend APIs using Java, Spring Boot, and MySQL.
Created database schemas and API architecture with Spring Data JPA integration.
Wrote unit and integration tests using JUnit and Mockito to improve application reliability.
Designed and developed web portals using Java, React.js, and Spring Boot to simplify public access to government services.
Led migration from legacy systems to modern frameworks, improving scalability, maintainability, and load times.
Maintained Spring-based applications in distributed architecture with a focus on performance and reliability.
Migrated Struts context to Spring MVC to enhance application scalability and performance.
Implemented interactive interfaces with React.js, Redux, Bootstrap, Chakra UI, and Thymeleaf.

projects.name: WelHire - AI-Powered Recruitment Automation Platform
projects.label: Recruitment Automation
projects.description: Designed and developed a scalable recruitment automation platform that streamlines job creation, CV sourcing, AI-driven candidate scoring, qualifier evaluation, and automated interview scheduling.
projects.impact: Improved recruitment efficiency through automation, reduced manual interview scheduling, enhanced candidate evaluation accuracy, and increased scalability with distributed microservices architecture.

projects.name: DOST
projects.label: Government Portal
projects.description: Streamlined student application processing for colleges with Spring backend services and intuitive Thymeleaf and React.js frontend modules.
projects.impact: Enhanced system functionality, improved user verification processes, and reduced application processing time.

projects.name: Diet Plan for Couch Vastav
projects.label: Enterprise Platform
projects.description: Created a comprehensive diet plan application with React.js frontend, Spring Boot APIs, and optimized PostgreSQL schemas for large data volumes.
projects.impact: Enhanced client satisfaction and supported compliance with nutritional guidelines.

projects.name: E-Kalyan
projects.label: Scholarship Platform
projects.description: Designed and developed a user-friendly scholarship distribution interface with React.js and Thymeleaf, backed by secure Spring services.
projects.impact: Improved system performance, increased user engagement, and supported timely scholarship disbursement.

certifications: Udemy Certified: Complete A-Z Full Stack Development Course
